Professional Corporate Solutions in Hong Kong

We specialize in providing tailored corporate solutions to help foreign businesses establish and thrive in Hong Kong. Since our inception in 2011, we have been dedicated to simplifying complex business processes and offering expert support across various industries.

Our services

We are Talent Fields

Comprehensive business solution

Founded in 2011, Talent Fields is a leading provider of comprehensive corporate solutions in Hong Kong specifically tailored for foreign businesses. Providing expert support backed by extensive experience, Talent Fields is dedicated to helping foreign businesses establish a strong presence in Hong Kong. We empower clients to thrive in their respective markets and achieve their strategic goals, ensuring they can focus on their core business activities while we handle the intricacies of the operational needs.

Our Services

Expertise across all services

Employee Contract Management​

Navigating employment laws and regulations is crucial for maintaining a smooth operation. We handle all aspects of employee contract management to ensure legal compliance and operational efficiency.​

Learn More

Payroll & MPF Management

Managing payroll and MPF contributions can be time-consuming and complex. Talent Fields ensures accuracy and compliance, allowing you to focus on your business operations.

Learn More

Visa Applications

Securing visas for your employees is critical for business continuity. Our experienced team simplifies the visa application process, ensuring timely approvals and hassle-free relocations.

Learn More

Company Formation

Setting up a business in Hong Kong can be complex. Talent Fields provides comprehensive company formation services, handling all legal and administrative requirements to establish your company efficiently and correctly

Learn More

About Us

We are a group of professional consultants who listen to your needs and ensure you will get the local support.

Why Us?

1. One-stop shop services
Talent Fields offers one-stop shop services to meet all your different needs which save up your time in handling the back office duties and allows you to explore more revenue and opportunities in your core competences.

2. Customized Services
Talent Fields provides personalize customer services to ensure we are fully fulfilled your needs by delivering a comprehensive solution.

3. Dedicated Services
Talent Fields committed to every task from our client as we have a strong team of professional consultants which support your business and assist you to achieve your substantive goals. Quality is guarantee.
